headline: When I Try to Imagine the Best Investment Opportunity for the Next 10 Years, Costco Stock Just Doesn't Make the Cut. That's Why I Keep Coming Back to This Stock.
summary: Costco is a great company and a reliable dividend stock, but it lacks one vital piece: value. This stock has that and more.
